title: [epic] LilyGO T-Deck support
description: LilyGO T-Deck: ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + WiFi + 2.8" screen + keyboard + trackball. Board files exist at lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/. Good for: handheld terminal, border router with UI. $60.
notes: HUMAN: T-Deck epic board Kconfig/vendor/variants and full integration questions - how to handle ESP32-S3 procpu/appcpu variants, Kconfig selection for keyboard/trackball/display/WiFi in overlays, vendor prefix in board files, power budget/UI init order with LCI
